name: claude-hooks-node-design
tags: node, design, callable class, SessionState, partial dict, timing, wrap, NODE_REGISTRY, observability, phase, parallel, sequential
body: Each node is a callable class (class FooNode: def __call__(self, state) -> dict). Nodes read only from state, return only fields they modify. Timing instrumentation (→ node_name, ← node_name Xms) applied at graph build time via wrap(name, fn) — not inside node files. NODE_REGISTRY + get_node() factory keeps build_session_graph() as pure wiring. Phase (parallel/sequential) logged via _PARALLEL_NODES frozenset in langchain_learning/nodes/_node_log.py — update this frozenset when graph topology changes.
